ai_summary: Bajaj Auto Limited has received a favorable appellate order, setting aside a previous tax demand of approximately Rs. 1.5 lakhs (including interest and penalty) related to alleged non-reversal of Input Tax Credit (ITC) on MEIS scrips. This decision completely drops the original allegation and associated financial demand, eliminating a minor contingent liability for the company. The resolution is positive, indicating no material adverse financial impact or new red flags from this specific tax dispute.
